title: Doc-Init Rec#2 — agents-md-init SKILL.md template + install into target project
description: Create templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md containing the 3-Phase agents-md-init skill (Phase 1: framework confirmation, Phase 2: invariants extraction, Phase 3: construction and write). Update init.ts to copy SKILL.md to the target project's .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md after writing forensic.json. Install must be non-destructive (skip if already exists).

files.change: New SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (name: agents-md-init, description: trigger phrase matching 'fab init just completed / forensic.json just generated / initialize project docs / generate AGENTS.md', allowed-tools: Read Write Glob Grep Bash). Body: Precondition (Read .fabric/forensic.json, abort if missing). Phase 1 (framework confirmation prompt). Phase 2 (invariants elicitation — ban/require/protect). Phase 3 (construct AGENTS.md from interview_trail + write init-context.json). Hard rules: zero TODO / ≤300 lines / ≤4 nesting / no YAML frontmatter in AGENTS.md.

files.target: initFabric() — SKILL.md copy step after forensic.json write
files.change: After writing forensic.json, resolve templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md path relative to CLI package root; use existsSync to check target .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md; if not exists: mkdirSync recursive + copyFileSync; if exists: skip (non-destructive); log outcome to stderr

implementation: Create templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/ directory under packages/cli/templates/ (or root templates/ — match existing template dir location from init.ts path resolution)
Write SKILL.md with exact YAML frontmatter format from 思路.md skill spec: name, description (must match fab init reason text for auto-trigger), allowed-tools

Body content: Precondition check (Read forensic.json, abort if missing). Phase 1 prompt asking to confirm framework kind/version/subkind. Phase 2 prompt for 3 invariant elicitations (ban/require/protect). Phase 3: construct domain_groups, write init-context.json to .fabric/, then generate AGENTS.md (≤300 lines, ≤4 nesting levels, zero TODO). Hard rules section.

Update init.ts: resolve SKILL.md template path using path.resolve(__dirname, '../templates/claude-skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md') or equivalent; add existsSync non-destructive guard; fs.mkdirSync({recursive:true}) + fs.copyFileSync to target .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md

reference.pattern: Non-destructive file copy pattern matching bootstrap.ts
reference.examples: Mirror bootstrap.ts merge-insert guard pattern; SKILL.md frontmatter format from 思路.md lines 210-214

criteria: Running fab init on a fresh target project creates .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md at the target root
SKILL.md frontmatter has correct name: agents-md-init and description containing trigger phrase referencing 'fab init' or 'forensic.json'
Running fab init a second time on same target — .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md is skipped (non-destructive, existing file unchanged)
SKILL.md body contains all 3 Phase sections with Phase 1 framework confirmation, Phase 2 invariants elicitation, Phase 3 construct and write
SKILL.md references the hard rules: zero TODO, ≤300 lines, ≤4 nesting levels, no YAML frontmatter in output AGENTS.md

rationale.chosen_approach: Template file in templates/ directory matches existing pattern (AGENTS.md.template); copy on init matches bootstrap.ts pattern for consistency
alternatives_considered: Embed SKILL.md content as a string constant in init.ts (harder to maintain/edit)
Download SKILL.md from a CDN at init time (introduces network dependency)
decision_factors: Consistency with existing template copy pattern
Description trigger phrase must precisely match fab init stdout reason text
rationale.tradeoffs: Template file must be bundled into npm package (add to tsup.config.ts assets copy list)

manual_checks: Run fab init on werewolf-minigame-stub — verify .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md exists and is non-empty
Inspect SKILL.md frontmatter: name/description/allowed-tools fields present
Run fab init a second time — verify .claude/skills/agents-md-init/SKILL.md content unchanged and no error thrown
success_metrics: SKILL.md passes YAML frontmatter parse without errors
Second fab init run: skip log message emitted, file content unchanged
unit: init-claude-install.test.ts (TASK-010): assert SKILL.md copied to target .claude/skills/

risks.description: Template path resolution fails when CLI is run from a global install (npm -g) vs local dev
risks.mitigation: Use __dirname relative path + check file exists at build time; add templates/ to tsup assets configuration (already done for AGENTS.md.template in TASK-001 or prior)
risks.fallback: If template not found, emit warning and skip SKILL.md install rather than crashing
